problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
mechanism: Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene
hypothesis: Combining Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
